productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Printed White Tshirts
description: CompositionWhite V-neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed neckline with tape detailing on the inseam, stitch detailing on the shoulders, short sleeves, stitch detailing along the sleeve cuffs and hemline, and has graphic print on the frontFittingRegularWash careDelicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm ironDo not iron directly on print/embroideryBold and stylish, this white t-shirt from united colors of benetton is perfect for casual wear. The clever image of the illustrated pocket with the pens and pencil would make anyone take a second look, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day long. Team this with jeans and canvas shoes for that cool, casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.11", Shoulders-18.5"
